debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
integrable_prod_inner_X :
  ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ
EvenIndex : (Fin m → ι × ι) → Prop := ⋯
w : ι → ℕ
hw : w ∈ A.piAntidiag m
⊢ Integrable (fun a => ∏ x ∈ A, ‖X x a‖ ^ (2 * w x)) μ

failed_attempts:
(by
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ : ∃ y : Fin m → ι, (∀ k, y k ∈ A) ∧
            (∀ x ∈ A, (Finset.univ.filter (fun k => y k = x)).card = w x) := by
          have h_multiset : ∃ M : Multiset ι, M.card = m ∧ (∀ x ∈ M, x ∈ A) ∧
              (∀ x ∈ A, Multiset.count x M = w x) := by
            use Multiset.bind (Multiset.ofList (Finset.toList A))
              (fun x => Multiset.replicate (w x) x)
            simp_all +decide [Finset.mem_piAntidiag]
            simp +decide [Multiset.count_bind, Multiset.count_replicate]
            exact ⟨fun x y hy hx => by rw [Multiset.mem_replicate] at hx; aesop,
              fun x hx hx' => False.elim <| hx' hx⟩
          obtain ⟨M, hM₁, hM₂, hM₃⟩ := h_multiset
          obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ : ∃ y : Fin m → ι, M = Multiset.ofList (List.ofFn y) := by
            obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ : ∃ l : List ι, l.length = m ∧ M = Multiset.ofList l :=
              ⟨M.toList, by simpa using hM₁, by simpa⟩
            use fun i => l.get ⟨i, by exact hl.1.symm ▸ i.2⟩
            generalize_proofs at *
            convert hl.2
            refine' List.ext_get _ _ <;> simp +decide [hl.1]
          refine' ⟨y, _, _⟩ <;> simp_all +decide [List.ofFn_eq_map]
          intro x hx; specialize hM₃ x hx; simp_all +decide [List.count]
          rw [← hM₃, List.countP_eq_length_filter]; aesop
        have h_prod_eq : ∀ ω, (∏ x ∈ A, ‖X x ω‖ ^ (2 * w x)) =
            (∏ k, ‖X (y k) ω‖ ^ 2) := by
          intro ω
          have h_eq : (∏ x ∈ A, ‖X x ω‖ ^ (2 * w x)) =
              (∏ x ∈ A, (∏ k ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun k => y k = x), ‖X x ω‖ ^ 2)) := by
            simp +decide [← hy.2, pow_mul]
            exact Finset.prod_congr rfl fun x hx => by rw [hy.2 x hx]
          rw [h_eq, Finset.prod_sigma']
          refine' Finset.prod_bij (fun k _ => k.snd) _ _ _ _ <;> simp +decide [hy]
          · grind +ring
          · grind
        simp_all +decide [sq]
        exact integrable_prod_norm_X (fun k => (y k, y k))
          (fun k => ⟨hy.1 k, hy.1 k⟩))
